description_long: This is a rectangular, mid-century modern style wooden media console or TV stand with a dark brown finish. The front features two open shelves on the left and a larger open compartment on the right, suitable for storing electronics, books, or decorative items. The back panel has a circular cable management hole, allowing for easy organization of wires and cords. The unit stands on four tapered legs, giving it a slightly elevated and stable appearance. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with no visible handles, doors, or glass panels. The overall design is minimalist and functional, making it suitable for urban living rooms, offices, or communal spaces.
description: A dark brown, mid-century modern wooden media console with open shelves and tapered legs, featuring a cable management hole at the back. Its minimalist design is both functional and stylish.
description_view_0: The front view shows two open shelves on the left and a large open compartment on the right, with four tapered legs visible.
description_view_1: The left side view displays a plain, flat wooden panel with no openings or features, and two legs.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a solid back panel with a single circular cable management hole and the four legs.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain wooden panel and two legs.
